name: linear-baseline-trainer
description: Fit-ит dummy и regularized LogisticRegression baseline внутри sklearn Pipeline(ColumnTransformer, estimator), сравнивает модели на validation, пишет comparison table, prediction rows, coefficient table, serialized spec и baseline report.
usage: python outputs/linear_baseline_trainer.py --spec ../data/tiny/problem_spec.json --preprocessing-contract ../data/tiny/preprocessing_contract.json --pipeline-spec ../data/tiny/pipeline_spec.json --column-transformer-spec ../data/tiny/column_transformer_spec.json --linear-baseline-spec ../data/tiny/linear_baseline_spec.json --features ../data/tiny/ml_raw_features.csv --labels ../data/tiny/ml_labels.csv --manifest ../data/tiny/ml_split_manifest.csv --output outputs/baseline_report.json --comparison-output outputs/baseline_comparison.csv --coefficients-output outputs/coefficient_table.csv --predictions-output outputs/baseline_predictions.csv --serialized-spec-output outputs/linear_baseline_serialized_spec.json
